L246978L246979L246980L246981L246982L246983
let K, addK, mulK, X, addX, smulX, M, addM, smulM, n; assume hn; let p; assume hp; let a, f; assume hRing, hBasis, hModule, hMultilinear, hPositive;
L246984
have h_s23_t9_repeated_basis_indices_vanish: \({\mathsf{addM}}\in\operatorname{Alt}^{{p}}({X},{\mathsf{addX}}) \to \forall idx\in {n}^{{p}},\;\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}} \to {f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)} = {0_{{M}}}\);
proof from hBasis (32 steps)
statement: alternating_multilinear_mapping K addK mulK p X addX smulX M addM smulM f → ∀idx ∈ np, (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j) → f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) = module_zero M addM;
L246991L246992L246993
assume hAlternating; let idx; assume hidx, hRepeated;
L246994L246995
have hBasisMaps: \(\forall i\in n,\;{a\left(i\right)} \in {X}\) by module_basis_vectors_map_into from hBasis;
formal
statement: ∀i ∈ n, a i ∈ X;
proof term: exact (god1_module_basis_vectors_map_into K addK mulK X addX smulX n a hBasis);
L246997L246998
have hTuple: \({\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)} \in {{X}^{{p}}}\) by lam_Pi from hBasisMaps, hidx;
formal
statement: (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) ∈ Xp;
proof term: exact (lam_Pi p (λh ⇒ X) (λh ⇒ a (idx h)) (λh hh ⇒ hBasisMaps (idx h) (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ n) idx h hidx hh)));
L247001
have hCollision: \(\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)\left(i\right)} = {\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)\left(j\right)}}\);
proof from hRepeated (21 steps)
statement: ∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) i = (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) j;
L247005
apply hRepeated;
L247006L247007
let i; assume hiData;
L247008L247009
have hi: \({i} \in {p}\) by hiData;
formal
statement: i ∈ p;
proof term: exact (andEL (i ∈ p) (∃j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j) hiData);
L247013L247014
have hJ: \(\exists j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}}\) by hiData;
formal
statement: ∃j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j;
proof term: exact (andER (i ∈ p) (∃j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j) hiData);
L247018
apply hJ;
L247019L247020
let j; assume hjData;
L247021L247022
have hj: \({j} \in {p}\) by hjData;
formal
statement: j ∈ p;
proof term: exact (andEL (j ∈ p) (i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j) hjData);
L247023L247024
have hijData: \({{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}}\) by hjData;
formal
statement: i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j;
proof term: exact (andER (j ∈ p) (i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j) hjData);
L247025L247026
have hDistinct: \({i} \neq {j}\) by hijData;
formal
statement: i ≠ j;
proof term: exact (andEL (i ≠ j) (idx i = idx j) hijData);
L247027L247028
have hIndicesEqual: \({idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}\) by hijData;
formal
statement: idx i = idx j;
proof term: exact (andER (i ≠ j) (idx i = idx j) hijData);
L247029L247032
have hTupleEqual: \({\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)\left(i\right)} = {\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)\left(j\right)}\) by transitivity from hi, hIndicesEqual, hj;
formal
statement: (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) i = (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) j;
proof term: exact (eq_i_tra ((λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) i) (a (idx i)) ((λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) j) (beta p (λh ⇒ a (idx h)) i hi) (eq_i_tra (a (idx i)) (a (idx j)) ((λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) j) (f_eq_i a (idx i) (idx j) hIndicesEqual) (eq_sym ((λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) j) (a (idx j)) (beta p (λh ⇒ a (idx h)) j hj))));
L247045
thus thesis by witness \(i\) from hi, hj, hDistinct, hTupleEqual;
formal
exact (ex_intro (λq ⇒ q ∈ p ∧ ∃r, r ∈ p ∧ (q ≠ r ∧ (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) q = (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) r)) i (andI (i ∈ p) (∃r, r ∈ p ∧ (i ≠ r ∧ (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) i = (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) r)) hi (ex_intro (λr ⇒ r ∈ p ∧ (i ≠ r ∧ (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) i = (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) r)) j (andI (j ∈ p) (i ≠ j ∧ (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) i = (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) j) hj (andI (i ≠ j) ((λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) i = (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) j) hDistinct hTupleEqual)))));
end;
L247076L247079
have hRepeatedArgumentsVanish: \(\forall z\in {X}^{{p}},\;\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{z\left(i\right)} = {z\left(j\right)}} \to {f\left(z\right)} = {0_{{M}}}\) by hAlternating;
formal
statement: ∀z ∈ Xp, (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ z i = z j) → f z = module_zero M addM;
proof term: exact (andER (multilinear_mapping K addK mulK p (λi ⇒ X) (λi ⇒ addX) (λi ⇒ smulX) M addM smulM f) (∀z ∈ Xp, (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ z i = z j) → f z = module_zero M addM) hAlternating);
L247087
thus thesis by hRepeatedArgumentsVanish from hTuple, hCollision;
formal
exact (hRepeatedArgumentsVanish (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) hTuple hCollision);
end;
L247089L247102
have h_s23_t9_theorem2_formal_call: \(\forall K0,\;\forall \mathsf{add0},\mathsf{mul0}:set \to set \to set,\;\forall p0\in \omega,\;\forall X0,\;\forall \mathsf{addX0},\mathsf{smulX0}:set \to set \to set,\;\forall M0,\;\forall \mathsf{addM0},\mathsf{smulM0}:set \to set \to set,\;\forall f0:set \to set,\;{0} \in {p0} \to {\mathsf{addM0}}\in\operatorname{Alt}^{{p0}}({X0},{\mathsf{addX0}}) \to {{f0}(x_\tau)=-{f0}(x)} \land {\forall \mathsf{sigma}\in \mathfrak S({p0}),\;\forall x0\in {X0}^{{p0}},\;{f0\left(({x0}_{{\mathsf{sigma}}(i)})_i\right)} = {{\varepsilon_{{\mathsf{sigma}}}}{f0\left(x0\right)}}}\) by s23_theorem2_alternating_multilinear_is_antisymmetric;
formal
statement: ∀K0, ∀add0 mul0 : set → set → set, ∀p0 ∈ ω, ∀X0, ∀addX0 smulX0 : set → set → set, ∀M0, ∀addM0 smulM0 : set → set → set, ∀f0 : set → set, 0 ∈ p0 → alternating_multilinear_mapping K0 add0 mul0 p0 X0 addX0 smulX0 M0 addM0 smulM0 f0 → antisymmetric_mapping X0 M0 addM0 p0 f0 ∧ ∀sigma ∈ permutation_group p0, ∀x0 ∈ X0p0, f0 (permuted_tuple p0 sigma x0) = signed_group_element M0 addM0 (permutation_signature p0 sigma) (f0 x0);
proof term: apply god1_s23_theorem2_alternating_multilinear_is_antisymmetric;
L247103
have h_s23_t9_permuted_basis_coefficients: \({\mathsf{addM}}\in\operatorname{Alt}^{{p}}({X},{\mathsf{addX}}) \to \forall idx\in {n}^{{p}},\;\forall \mathsf{sigma}\in \mathfrak S({p}),\;{f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)} = {\mathsf{smulM}\left(\varepsilon_{{\mathsf{sigma}}}\cdot 1_{{K}},f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)}\);
proof from hBasis, h_s23_t9_theorem2_formal_call, hp, hPositive, hMultilinear, hRing, hModule (29 steps)
statement: alternating_multilinear_mapping K addK mulK p X addX smulX M addM smulM f → ∀idx ∈ np, ∀sigma ∈ permutation_group p, f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx (sigma h))) = smulM (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)));
L247110L247111L247112L247113L247114
assume hAlternating; let idx; assume hidx; let sigma; assume hsigma;
L247115L247116
have hBasisMaps: \(\forall i\in n,\;{a\left(i\right)} \in {X}\) by module_basis_vectors_map_into from hBasis;
formal
statement: ∀i ∈ n, a i ∈ X;
proof term: exact (god1_module_basis_vectors_map_into K addK mulK X addX smulX n a hBasis);
L247118L247119
have hTuple: \({\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)} \in {{X}^{{p}}}\) by lam_Pi from hBasisMaps, hidx;
formal
statement: (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) ∈ Xp;
proof term: exact (lam_Pi p (λh ⇒ X) (λh ⇒ a (idx h)) (λh hh ⇒ hBasisMaps (idx h) (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ n) idx h hidx hh)));
L247122L247124
have hPermutedTarget: \({\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(h\right)\right)\right)} \in {{X}^{{p}}}\) by permutation_function_in from hBasisMaps, hidx, hsigma;
formal
statement: (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx (sigma h))) ∈ Xp;
proof term: exact (lam_Pi p (λh ⇒ X) (λh ⇒ a (idx (sigma h))) (λh hh ⇒ hBasisMaps (idx (sigma h)) (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ n) idx (sigma h) hidx (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ p) sigma h (god1_permutation_function_in p sigma hsigma) hh))));
L247129
have hPermutedTupleEqualsTarget: \({({\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)}_{{\mathsf{sigma}}(i)})_i} = {\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(h\right)\right)\right)}\);
proof from hsigma, hTuple, hPermutedTarget (6 steps)
statement: permuted_tuple p sigma (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) = (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx (sigma h)));
L247132
apply extensionality using permuted_tuple_in from hsigma, hTuple, hPermutedTarget;
L247137L247138
let h; assume hh;
L247139L247140
have hsigmah: \({\mathsf{sigma}\left(h\right)} \in {p}\) by permutation_function_in from hsigma, hh;
formal
statement: sigma h ∈ p;
proof term: exact (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ p) sigma h (god1_permutation_function_in p sigma hsigma) hh);
L247142
thus thesis by transitivity from hh, hsigmah;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (permuted_tuple p sigma (λq ∈ p ⇒ a (idx q)) h) ((λq ∈ p ⇒ a (idx q)) (sigma h)) ((λq ∈ p ⇒ a (idx (sigma q))) h) (beta p (λq ⇒ (λr ∈ p ⇒ a (idx r)) (sigma q)) h hh) (eq_i_tra ((λq ∈ p ⇒ a (idx q)) (sigma h)) (a (idx (sigma h))) ((λq ∈ p ⇒ a (idx (sigma q))) h) (beta p (λq ⇒ a (idx q)) (sigma h) hsigmah) (eq_sym ((λq ∈ p ⇒ a (idx (sigma q))) h) (a (idx (sigma h))) (beta p (λq ⇒ a (idx (sigma q))) h hh))));
end;
L247158L247164
have hTheorem2Data: \({{f}(x_\tau)=-{f}(x)} \land {\forall tau\in \mathfrak S({p}),\;\forall z\in {X}^{{p}},\;{f\left(({z}_{{tau}(i)})_i\right)} = {{\varepsilon_{{tau}}}{f\left(z\right)}}}\) by h_s23_t9_theorem2_formal_call from hp, hPositive, hAlternating;
formal
statement: antisymmetric_mapping X M addM p f ∧ ∀tau ∈ permutation_group p, ∀z ∈ Xp, f (permuted_tuple p tau z) = signed_group_element M addM (permutation_signature p tau) (f z);
proof term: exact (h_s23_t9_theorem2_formal_call K addK mulK p hp X addX smulX M addM smulM f hPositive hAlternating);
L247167L247172
have hPermutationLaw: \(\forall tau\in \mathfrak S({p}),\;\forall z\in {X}^{{p}},\;{f\left(({z}_{{tau}(i)})_i\right)} = {{\varepsilon_{{tau}}}{f\left(z\right)}}\) by hTheorem2Data;
formal
statement: ∀tau ∈ permutation_group p, ∀z ∈ Xp, f (permuted_tuple p tau z) = signed_group_element M addM (permutation_signature p tau) (f z);
proof term: exact (andER (antisymmetric_mapping X M addM p f) (∀tau ∈ permutation_group p, ∀z ∈ Xp, f (permuted_tuple p tau z) = signed_group_element M addM (permutation_signature p tau) (f z)) hTheorem2Data);
L247179L247184
have hRawPermutation: \({f\left(({\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)}_{{\mathsf{sigma}}(i)})_i\right)} = {{\varepsilon_{{\mathsf{sigma}}}}{f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)}}\) by hPermutationLaw from hsigma, hTuple;
formal
statement: f (permuted_tuple p sigma (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))) = signed_group_element M addM (permutation_signature p sigma) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)));
proof term: exact (hPermutationLaw sigma hsigma (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) hTuple);
L247186L247187
have hTupleValueIn: \({f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)} \in {M}\) by multilinear_mapping_maps_into from hMultilinear, hTuple;
formal
statement: f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) ∈ M;
proof term: exact (god1_multilinear_mapping_maps_into K addK mulK p (λi ⇒ X) (λi ⇒ addX) (λi ⇒ smulX) M addM smulM f hMultilinear (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) hTuple);
L247191L247197
have hScalarAction: \({\mathsf{smulM}\left(\varepsilon_{{\mathsf{sigma}}}\cdot 1_{{K}},f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)} = {{\varepsilon_{{\mathsf{sigma}}}}{f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)}}\) by signature_scalar_module_action from hRing, hModule, hTupleValueIn;
formal
statement: smulM (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))) = signed_group_element M addM (permutation_signature p sigma) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)));
proof term: exact (god1_signature_scalar_module_action K addK mulK M addM smulM (andEL (ring K addK mulK) (commutative_on K mulK) hRing) hModule p sigma (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))) hTupleValueIn);
L247202
thus thesis by transitivity from hPermutedTupleEqualsTarget, hRawPermutation, hScalarAction;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx (sigma h)))) (f (permuted_tuple p sigma (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) (smulM (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) (f_eq_i f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx (sigma h))) (permuted_tuple p sigma (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))) (eq_sym (permuted_tuple p sigma (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))) (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx (sigma h))) hPermutedTupleEqualsTarget)) (eq_i_tra (f (permuted_tuple p sigma (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) (signed_group_element M addM (permutation_signature p sigma) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) (smulM (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) hRawPermutation (eq_sym (smulM (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) (signed_group_element M addM (permutation_signature p sigma) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) hScalarAction)));
end;
L247229
have h_s23_t9_coefficient_conditions_necessary: \({\mathsf{addM}}\in\operatorname{Alt}^{{p}}({X},{\mathsf{addX}}) \to c_{i_1\ldots i_p}=0,\ c_{i_\sigma}=\varepsilon(\sigma)c_i\);
proof from h_s23_t9_repeated_basis_indices_vanish, h_s23_t9_permuted_basis_coefficients (2 steps)
statement: alternating_multilinear_mapping K addK mulK p X addX smulX M addM smulM f → alternating_basis_coefficient_conditions K addK mulK X addX smulX M addM smulM n p a f;
L247235
assume hAlternating;
L247236
thus thesis by h_s23_t9_repeated_basis_indices_vanish, hAlternating, h_s23_t9_permuted_basis_coefficients;
formal
exact (andI (∀idx ∈ np, (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j) → f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) = module_zero M addM) (∀idx ∈ np, ∀sigma ∈ permutation_group p, f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx (sigma h))) = smulM (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) (h_s23_t9_repeated_basis_indices_vanish hAlternating) (h_s23_t9_permuted_basis_coefficients hAlternating));
end;
L247264
have h_s23_t9_restrict_to_distinct_indices: \(c_{i_1\ldots i_p}=0,\ c_{i_\sigma}=\varepsilon(\sigma)c_i \to \forall x\in {X}^{{p}},\;\exists \mathsf{summand}:set \to set,\;{{\forall idx\in \left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid \neg {\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}}}\right\},\;{\mathsf{summand}\left(idx\right)} \in {M}} \land {\forall idx\in \left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid \neg {\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}}}\right\},\;{\mathsf{summand}\left(idx\right)} = {\mathsf{smulM}\left(\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{x\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)}_i,f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)}}} \land {{f\left(x\right)} = {\sum_{i\in {\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid \neg {\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}}}\right\}}}{\mathsf{summand}}_i}}\);
proof from hn, hBasis, hp, hRing, hModule, hMultilinear (58 steps)
statement: alternating_basis_coefficient_conditions K addK mulK X addX smulX M addM smulM n p a f → ∀x ∈ Xp, ∃summand : set → set, ((∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)}, summand idx ∈ M) ∧ (∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)}, summand idx = smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))))) ∧ f x = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} summand;
L247284L247285L247286
assume hConditions; let x; assume hx;
L247287L247289
have hBases: \(\forall h\in p,\;{{n} \in {\omega}} \land {{a}\text{ is a basis of }{X}}\) by hn, hBasis;
formal
statement: ∀h ∈ p, n ∈ ω ∧ module_basis K addK mulK X addX smulX n a;
proof term: exact (λh hh ⇒ andI (n ∈ ω) (module_basis K addK mulK X addX smulX n a) hn hBasis);
L247292L247303
have hExpansionExists: \(\exists \mathsf{coeff}:set \to set,\;{{\forall idx\in \mathsf{Pi\_} h\in p,\;n,\;{\mathsf{coeff}\left(idx\right)} \in {M}} \land {\forall idx\in \mathsf{Pi\_} h\in p,\;n,\;{\mathsf{coeff}\left(idx\right)} = {f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)}}} \land {\forall z\in \prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;X}_i,\;{f\left(z\right)} = {\sum_{i\in {\mathsf{Pi\_} h\in p,\;n}}{\lambda idx,\;\mathsf{smulM}\left(\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{z\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)}_i,\mathsf{coeff}\left(idx\right)\right)}_i}}\) by multilinear_free_basis_expansion_iff from hp, hRing, hBases, hModule, hMultilinear;
formal
statement: ∃coeff : set → set, (∀idx ∈ (∏h ∈ p, n), coeff idx ∈ M) ∧ (∀idx ∈ (∏h ∈ p, n), coeff idx = f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))) ∧ ∀z ∈ indexed_module_product p (λh ⇒ X), f z = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (∏h ∈ p, n) (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (z h) (idx h))) (coeff idx));
proof term: exact (iffEL (multilinear_mapping K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ X) (λh ⇒ addX) (λh ⇒ smulX) M addM smulM f) (∃coeff : set → set, (∀idx ∈ (∏h ∈ p, n), coeff idx ∈ M) ∧ (∀idx ∈ (∏h ∈ p, n), coeff idx = f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))) ∧ ∀z ∈ indexed_module_product p (λh ⇒ X), f z = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (∏h ∈ p, n) (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (z h) (idx h))) (coeff idx))) (god1_multilinear_free_basis_expansion_iff K addK mulK p hp (λh ⇒ X) (λh ⇒ addX) (λh ⇒ smulX) (λh ⇒ n) (λh ⇒ a) M addM smulM f hRing hBases hModule) hMultilinear);
L247322
apply hExpansionExists;
L247323L247324
let coeff; assume hCoeffData;
L247325L247329
have hCoeffPrefix: \({\forall idx\in \mathsf{Pi\_} h\in p,\;n,\;{\mathsf{coeff}\left(idx\right)} \in {M}} \land {\forall idx\in \mathsf{Pi\_} h\in p,\;n,\;{\mathsf{coeff}\left(idx\right)} = {f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)}}\) by hCoeffData;
formal
statement: (∀idx ∈ (∏h ∈ p, n), coeff idx ∈ M) ∧ (∀idx ∈ (∏h ∈ p, n), coeff idx = f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)));
proof term: exact (andEL ((∀idx ∈ (∏h ∈ p, n), coeff idx ∈ M) ∧ (∀idx ∈ (∏h ∈ p, n), coeff idx = f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) (∀z ∈ indexed_module_product p (λh ⇒ X), f z = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (∏h ∈ p, n) (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (z h) (idx h))) (coeff idx))) hCoeffData);
L247340L247341
have hCoeffIn: \(\forall idx\in {n}^{{p}},\;{\mathsf{coeff}\left(idx\right)} \in {M}\) by hCoeffPrefix;
formal
statement: ∀idx ∈ np, coeff idx ∈ M;
proof term: exact (andEL (∀idx ∈ (∏h ∈ p, n), coeff idx ∈ M) (∀idx ∈ (∏h ∈ p, n), coeff idx = f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))) hCoeffPrefix);
L247345L247347
have hCoeffEq: \(\forall idx\in {n}^{{p}},\;{\mathsf{coeff}\left(idx\right)} = {f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)}\) by hCoeffPrefix;
formal
statement: ∀idx ∈ np, coeff idx = f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h));
proof term: exact (andER (∀idx ∈ (∏h ∈ p, n), coeff idx ∈ M) (∀idx ∈ (∏h ∈ p, n), coeff idx = f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))) hCoeffPrefix);
L247351L247358
have hFormula: \({f\left(x\right)} = {\sum_{i\in {{n}^{{p}}}}{\lambda idx,\;\mathsf{smulM}\left(\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{x\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)}_i,\mathsf{coeff}\left(idx\right)\right)}_i}\) by hCoeffData, hx;
formal
statement: f x = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (np) (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx));
proof term: exact ((andER ((∀idx ∈ (∏h ∈ p, n), coeff idx ∈ M) ∧ (∀idx ∈ (∏h ∈ p, n), coeff idx = f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) (∀z ∈ indexed_module_product p (λh ⇒ X), f z = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (∏h ∈ p, n) (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (z h) (idx h))) (coeff idx))) hCoeffData) x hx);
L247369L247370
have hFiniteAll: \(\mathrm{finite}({{n}^{{p}}})\) by dependent_natural_product_finite from hp, hn;
formal
statement: finite (np);
proof term: exact (god1_dependent_natural_product_finite p hp (λh ⇒ n) (λh hh ⇒ hn));
L247372L247375
have hDistinctSubset: \({\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid \neg {\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}}}\right\}} \subseteq {{n}^{{p}}}\) by Sep_Subq;
formal
statement: {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} ⊆ np;
proof term: exact (Sep_Subq (np) (λidx ⇒ not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)));
L247377L247380
have hFiniteDistinct: \(\mathrm{finite}({\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid \neg {\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}}}\right\}})\) by Subq_finite from hFiniteAll, hDistinctSubset;
formal
statement: finite {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)};
proof term: exact (Subq_finite (np) hFiniteAll {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} hDistinctSubset);
L247383L247384
have hCoreRing: \(({K},{\mathsf{addK}},{\mathsf{mulK}})\text{ is a ring}\) by hRing;
formal
statement: ring K addK mulK;
proof term: exact (andEL (ring K addK mulK) (commutative_on K mulK) hRing);
L247385L247386
have hAbelian: \(({M},{\mathsf{addM}})\text{ is an abelian group}\) by left_module_ring_and_additive_component from hModule;
formal
statement: abelian_group M addM;
proof term: exact (andER (ring K addK mulK) (abelian_group M addM) (god1_left_module_ring_and_additive_component K addK mulK M addM smulM hModule));
L247389L247393
have hScalarCore: \({\forall \mathsf{scalar}\in K,\;\forall y\in M,\;{\mathsf{smulM}\left(\mathsf{scalar},y\right)} \in {M}} \land {\forall \mathsf{scalar},mu\in K,\;\forall y\in M,\;{\mathsf{smulM}\left(\mathsf{scalar},\mathsf{smulM}\left(mu,y\right)\right)} = {\mathsf{smulM}\left(\mathsf{mulK}\left(\mathsf{scalar},mu\right),y\right)}}\) by left_module_scalar_core_component from hModule;
formal
statement: (∀scalar ∈ K, ∀y ∈ M, smulM scalar y ∈ M) ∧ (∀scalar mu ∈ K, ∀y ∈ M, smulM scalar (smulM mu y) = smulM (mulK scalar mu) y);
proof term: exact (god1_left_module_scalar_core_component K addK mulK M addM smulM hModule);
L247395
have hTerms: \(\forall idx\in {n}^{{p}},\;{\mathsf{smulM}\left(\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{x\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)}_i,\mathsf{coeff}\left(idx\right)\right)} \in {M}\);
proof from hCoreRing, hp, hBasis, hx, hScalarCore, hCoeffIn (5 steps)
statement: ∀idx ∈ np, smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx) ∈ M;
L247401L247402
let idx; assume hidx;
L247403L247407
have hProductIn: \({\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{x\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)}_i} \in {K}\) by ring_finite_product_in from hCoreRing, hp, hBasis, hx, hidx;
formal
statement: ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h)) ∈ K;
proof term: exact (god1_ring_finite_product_in K addK mulK hCoreRing p (nat_finite p (omega_nat_p p hp)) (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h)) (λh hh ⇒ god1_basis_coordinate_in K addK mulK X addX smulX n a hBasis (x h) (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ X) x h hx hh) (idx h) (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ n) idx h hidx hh)));
L247415
thus thesis by hScalarCore, hProductIn, hCoeffIn, hidx;
formal
exact (andEL (∀scalar ∈ K, ∀y ∈ M, smulM scalar y ∈ M) (∀scalar mu ∈ K, ∀y ∈ M, smulM scalar (smulM mu y) = smulM (mulK scalar mu) y) hScalarCore (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) hProductIn (coeff idx) (hCoeffIn idx hidx));
end;
L247424L247427
have hRepeatedCoefficient: \(\forall idx\in {n}^{{p}},\;\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}} \to {\mathsf{coeff}\left(idx\right)} = {0_{{M}}}\) by transitivity from hCoeffEq, hConditions;
formal
statement: ∀idx ∈ np, (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j) → coeff idx = module_zero M addM;
proof term: exact (λidx hidx hRepeated ⇒ eq_i_tra (coeff idx) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))) (module_zero M addM) (hCoeffEq idx hidx) ((andEL (∀t ∈ np, (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ t i = t j) → f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (t h)) = module_zero M addM) (∀t ∈ np, ∀sigma ∈ permutation_group p, f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (t (sigma h))) = smulM (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (t h)))) hConditions) idx hidx hRepeated));
L247439
have hZeroScalar: \(\forall \mathsf{scalar}\in K,\;{\mathsf{smulM}\left(\mathsf{scalar},0_{{M}}\right)} = {0_{{M}}}\);
proof from hModule (3 steps)
L247441L247446
have hZeroPrefix: \({\forall \mathsf{scalar}\in K,\;{\mathsf{smulM}\left(\mathsf{scalar},0_{{M}}\right)} = {0_{{M}}}} \land {\forall y\in M,\;{\mathsf{smulM}\left(0_{{K}},y\right)} = {0_{{M}}}}\) by module_zero_and_negation_scalar_laws from hModule;
formal
statement: ((∀scalar ∈ K, smulM scalar (module_zero M addM) = module_zero M addM) ∧ (∀y ∈ M, smulM (ring_zero K addK) y = module_zero M addM));
proof term: exact (andEL ((∀scalar ∈ K, smulM scalar (module_zero M addM) = module_zero M addM) ∧ (∀y ∈ M, smulM (ring_zero K addK) y = module_zero M addM)) (∀y ∈ M, module_negation M addM y = smulM (ring_negation K addK (ring_one K mulK)) y) (god1_module_zero_and_negation_scalar_laws K addK mulK M addM smulM hModule));
L247455
thus thesis by hZeroPrefix;
formal
exact (andEL (∀scalar ∈ K, smulM scalar (module_zero M addM) = module_zero M addM) (∀y ∈ M, smulM (ring_zero K addK) y = module_zero M addM) hZeroPrefix);
end;
L247461
have hZeroOffDistinct: \(\forall idx\in {n}^{{p}},\;{idx} \notin {\left\{t\in {n}^{{p}}\mid \neg {\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{t\left(i\right)} = {t\left(j\right)}}}\right\}} \to {\mathsf{smulM}\left(\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{x\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)}_i,\mathsf{coeff}\left(idx\right)\right)} = {0_{{M}}}\);
proof from hCoreRing, hp, hBasis, hx, hRepeatedCoefficient, hZeroScalar (9 steps)
statement: ∀idx ∈ np, idx ∉ {t ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ t i = t j)} → smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx) = module_zero M addM;
L247469L247470
let idx; assume hidx, hNotDistinct;
L247471
have hRepeated: \(\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}}\);
proof from hNotDistinct, hidx (3 steps)
L247472
apply dneg;
L247473
assume hNoRepeated;
L247474
thus thesis by hNotDistinct from hidx, hNoRepeated;
formal
exact (hNotDistinct (SepI (np) (λt ⇒ not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ t i = t j)) idx hidx hNoRepeated));
end;
L247477L247481
have hProductIn: \({\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{x\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)}_i} \in {K}\) by ring_finite_product_in from hCoreRing, hp, hBasis, hx, hidx;
formal
statement: ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h)) ∈ K;
proof term: exact (god1_ring_finite_product_in K addK mulK hCoreRing p (nat_finite p (omega_nat_p p hp)) (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h)) (λh hh ⇒ god1_basis_coordinate_in K addK mulK X addX smulX n a hBasis (x h) (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ X) x h hx hh) (idx h) (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ n) idx h hidx hh)));
L247489
thus thesis by transitivity from hRepeatedCoefficient, hidx, hRepeated, hZeroScalar, hProductIn;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx)) (smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (module_zero M addM)) (module_zero M addM) (f_eq_i (smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h)))) (coeff idx) (module_zero M addM) (hRepeatedCoefficient idx hidx hRepeated)) (hZeroScalar (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) hProductIn));
end;
L247511L247526
have hRingSumRestriction: \({\sum_{i\in {{n}^{{p}}}}{\lambda idx,\;\mathsf{smulM}\left(\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{x\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)}_i,\mathsf{coeff}\left(idx\right)\right)}_i} = {\sum_{i\in {\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid \neg {\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}}}\right\}}}{\lambda idx,\;\mathsf{smulM}\left(\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{x\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)}_i,\mathsf{coeff}\left(idx\right)\right)}_i}\) by abelian_finite_sum_zero_extension from hAbelian, hFiniteAll, hDistinctSubset, hTerms, hZeroOffDistinct;
formal
statement: ring_finite_sum M addM (np) (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx)) = ring_finite_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx));
proof term: exact (god1_abelian_finite_sum_zero_extension M addM hAbelian (np) hFiniteAll {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} hDistinctSubset (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx)) hTerms hZeroOffDistinct);
L247535L247544
have hRestrictedFormula: \({f\left(x\right)} = {\sum_{i\in {\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid \neg {\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}}}\right\}}}{\lambda idx,\;\mathsf{smulM}\left(\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{x\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)}_i,\mathsf{coeff}\left(idx\right)\right)}_i}\) by transitivity using module_finitely_supported_sum_finite_index from hFormula, hAbelian, hFiniteAll, hTerms, hRingSumRestriction, hFiniteDistinct, hDistinctSubset;
formal
statement: f x = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx));
proof term: exact (eq_i_tra (f x) (module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (np) (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx))) (module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx))) hFormula (eq_i_tra (module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (np) (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx))) (ring_finite_sum M addM (np) (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx))) (module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx))) (god1_module_finitely_supported_sum_finite_index M addM hAbelian (np) hFiniteAll (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx)) hTerms) (eq_i_tra (ring_finite_sum M addM (np) (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx))) (ring_finite_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx))) (module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx))) hRingSumRestriction (eq_sym (module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx))) (ring_finite_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx))) (god1_module_finitely_supported_sum_finite_index M addM hAbelian {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} hFiniteDistinct (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx)) (λidx hidx ⇒ hTerms idx (hDistinctSubset idx hidx)))))));
L247640
take \(\lambda idx,\;\mathsf{smulM}\left(\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{x\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)}_i,\mathsf{coeff}\left(idx\right)\right)\);
L247645
thus thesis by hTerms, hDistinctSubset, hCoeffEq, hRestrictedFormula;
formal
exact (andI ((∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)}, smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx) ∈ M) ∧ (∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)}, smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx) = smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))))) (f x = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} (λidx ⇒ smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx))) (andI (∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)}, smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx) ∈ M) (∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)}, smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (coeff idx) = smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) (λidx hidx ⇒ hTerms idx (hDistinctSubset idx hidx)) (λidx hidx ⇒ f_eq_i (smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h)))) (coeff idx) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))) (hCoeffEq idx (hDistinctSubset idx hidx)))) hRestrictedFormula);
end;
L247706
have h_s23_t9_finite_subset_increasing_enumeration: \(\forall N\in \omega,\;\forall r\in \omega,\;\forall A\in \wp {N},\;\mathrm{equip}({A},{r}) \to \exists e\in {A}^{{r}},\;{{\lambda i,\;\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} : {r} \xrightarrow{\sim} {A}} \land {\forall i,j\in r,\;{i} \in {j} \to {\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} \in {\left(e\right)\left(j\right)}}\);
proof (125 steps)
statement: ∀N ∈ ω, ∀r ∈ ω, ∀A ∈ 𝒫 N, equip A r → ∃e ∈ Ar, bij r A (λi ⇒ e i) ∧ ∀i j ∈ r, i ∈ j → e i ∈ e j;
L247712
have hEnumerationInduction: \(\forall N,\;\mathrm{nat\_p}({N}) \to \forall r\in \omega,\;\forall A\in \wp {N},\;\mathrm{equip}({A},{r}) \to \exists e\in {A}^{{r}},\;{{\lambda i,\;\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} : {r} \xrightarrow{\sim} {A}} \land {\forall i,j\in r,\;{i} \in {j} \to {\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} \in {\left(e\right)\left(j\right)}}\);
proof (123 steps)
statement: ∀N, nat_p N → ∀r ∈ ω, ∀A ∈ 𝒫 N, equip A r → ∃e ∈ Ar, bij r A (λi ⇒ e i) ∧ ∀i j ∈ r, i ∈ j → e i ∈ e j;
L247718
have hEnumerationBase: \(\forall r\in \omega,\;\forall A\in \wp {0},\;\mathrm{equip}({A},{r}) \to \exists e\in {A}^{{r}},\;{{\lambda i,\;\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} : {r} \xrightarrow{\sim} {A}} \land {\forall i,j\in r,\;{i} \in {j} \to {\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} \in {\left(e\right)\left(j\right)}}\);
proof (15 steps)
statement: ∀r ∈ ω, ∀A ∈ 𝒫 0, equip A r → ∃e ∈ Ar, bij r A (λi ⇒ e i) ∧ ∀i j ∈ r, i ∈ j → e i ∈ e j;
L247723L247724L247725L247726
let r; assume hr; let A; assume hA, hEquip;
L247727L247728
have hAEmpty: \({A} = {0}\) by extensionality from hA;
formal
statement: A = 0;
proof term: exact (set_ext A 0 (λz hz ⇒ (PowerE 0 A hA) z hz) (λz hz ⇒ FalseE (EmptyE z hz) (z ∈ A)));
L247731L247732
have hEquipZeroR: \(\mathrm{equip}({0},{r})\) by equip_domain_eq_subst from hAEmpty, hEquip;
L247733L247734
have hrZero: \({r} = {0}\) by equip_0_Empty from hEquipZeroR;
formal
statement: r = 0;
proof term: exact (equip_0_Empty r (equip_sym 0 r hEquipZeroR));
L247735L247736
have hEmptyFunction: \({\lambda i\in r,\;0} \in {{A}^{{r}}}\) by lam_Pi from hrZero;
formal
statement: (λi ∈ r ⇒ 0) ∈ Ar;
proof term: exact (lam_Pi r (λi ⇒ A) (λi ⇒ 0) (λi hi ⇒ FalseE (EmptyE i (mem_eq_set_subst r 0 i hrZero hi)) (0 ∈ A)));
L247739L247740
have hEmptyBij: \({\lambda i,\;\left(\lambda q\in r,\;0\right)\left(i\right)} : {r} \xrightarrow{\sim} {A}\) by bijectivity from hrZero, hAEmpty;
formal
statement: bij r A (λi ⇒ (λq ∈ r ⇒ 0) i);
proof term: exact (bijI r A (λi ⇒ (λq ∈ r ⇒ 0) i) (λi hi ⇒ FalseE (EmptyE i (mem_eq_set_subst r 0 i hrZero hi)) ((λq ∈ r ⇒ 0) i ∈ A)) (λi hi j hj hij ⇒ FalseE (EmptyE i (mem_eq_set_subst r 0 i hrZero hi)) (i = j)) (λy hy ⇒ FalseE (EmptyE y (mem_eq_set_subst A 0 y hAEmpty hy)) (∃i ∈ r, (λq ∈ r ⇒ 0) i = y)));
L247749
thus thesis by witness \(\lambda i\in r,\;0\) from hEmptyFunction, hEmptyBij, hrZero;
formal
exact (ex_intro (λe ⇒ e ∈ Ar ∧ (bij r A (λi ⇒ e i) ∧ ∀i j ∈ r, i ∈ j → e i ∈ e j)) (λi ∈ r ⇒ 0) (andI ((λi ∈ r ⇒ 0) ∈ Ar) (bij r A (λi ⇒ (λq ∈ r ⇒ 0) i) ∧ ∀i j ∈ r, i ∈ j → (λq ∈ r ⇒ 0) i ∈ (λq ∈ r ⇒ 0) j) hEmptyFunction (andI (bij r A (λi ⇒ (λq ∈ r ⇒ 0) i)) (∀i j ∈ r, i ∈ j → (λq ∈ r ⇒ 0) i ∈ (λq ∈ r ⇒ 0) j) hEmptyBij (λi hi j hj hij ⇒ FalseE (EmptyE i (mem_eq_set_subst r 0 i hrZero hi)) ((λq ∈ r ⇒ 0) i ∈ (λq ∈ r ⇒ 0) j)))));
end;
L247768
have hEnumerationStep: \(\forall N,\;\mathrm{nat\_p}({N}) \to \forall r\in \omega,\;\forall A\in \wp {N},\;\mathrm{equip}({A},{r}) \to \exists e\in {A}^{{r}},\;{{\lambda i,\;\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} : {r} \xrightarrow{\sim} {A}} \land {\forall i,j\in r,\;{i} \in {j} \to {\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} \in {\left(e\right)\left(j\right)}} \to \forall r\in \omega,\;\forall A\in \wp {{N} \cup \{{N}\}},\;\mathrm{equip}({A},{r}) \to \exists e\in {A}^{{r}},\;{{\lambda i,\;\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} : {r} \xrightarrow{\sim} {A}} \land {\forall i,j\in r,\;{i} \in {j} \to {\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} \in {\left(e\right)\left(j\right)}}\);
proof (103 steps)
statement: ∀N, nat_p N → (∀r ∈ ω, ∀A ∈ 𝒫 N, equip A r → ∃e ∈ Ar, bij r A (λi ⇒ e i) ∧ ∀i j ∈ r, i ∈ j → e i ∈ e j) → ∀r ∈ ω, ∀A ∈ 𝒫 (ordsucc N), equip A r → ∃e ∈ Ar, bij r A (λi ⇒ e i) ∧ ∀i j ∈ r, i ∈ j → e i ∈ e j;
L247779L247780L247781L247782L247783L247784
let N; assume hN, hInd; let r; assume hr; let A; assume hA, hEquip;
L247785
have hEnumerationContains: \({N} \in {A} \to \exists e\in {A}^{{r}},\;{{\lambda i,\;\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} : {r} \xrightarrow{\sim} {A}} \land {\forall i,j\in r,\;{i} \in {j} \to {\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} \in {\left(e\right)\left(j\right)}}\);
proof from hEquip, hr, hA, hInd (88 steps)
statement: N ∈ A → ∃e ∈ Ar, bij r A (λi ⇒ e i) ∧ ∀i j ∈ r, i ∈ j → e i ∈ e j;
L247789
assume hNA;
L247790
have hrNonzero: \({r} \neq {0}\);
proof from hEquip, hNA (6 steps)
L247791
assume hrZero;
L247792L247793
have hEquipAZero: \(\mathrm{equip}({A},{0})\) by equip_codomain_eq_subst from hrZero, hEquip;
L247794L247795
have hAZero: \({A} = {0}\) by equip_0_Empty from hEquipAZero;
L247796
thus thesis by EmptyE from hAZero, hNA;
formal
exact (EmptyE N (mem_eq_set_subst A 0 N hAZero hNA));
end;
L247797L247798
have hPositiveR: \({0} \in {r}\) by natural_nonzero_contains_zero from hr, hrNonzero;
L247799L247800
have hrSucc: \({r} = {{\bigcup {r}} \cup \{{\bigcup {r}}\}}\) by positive_natural_successor_union from hr, hPositiveR;
L247801L247802
have hUnionNat: \({\bigcup {r}} \in {\omega}\) by omega_TransSet from hr, hrSucc;
formal
statement: ⋃ r ∈ ω;
proof term: exact (omega_TransSet r hr (⋃ r) (mem_eq_set_subst (ordsucc (⋃ r)) r (⋃ r) (eq_sym r (ordsucc (⋃ r)) hrSucc) (ordsuccI2 (⋃ r))));
L247806L247807
have hBPower: \({{A} \setminus {\left\{N\right\}}} \in {\wp {N}}\) by remove_new_point_subset from hA;
formal
statement: A ∖ {N} ∈ 𝒫 N;
proof term: exact (PowerI N (A ∖ {N}) (god1_remove_new_point_subset N A hA));
L247809L247810
have hEquipASucc: \(\mathrm{equip}({A},{{\bigcup {r}} \cup \{{\bigcup {r}}\}})\) by equip_codomain_eq_subst from hrSucc, hEquip;
formal
statement: equip A (ordsucc (⋃ r));
proof term: exact (god1_equip_codomain_eq_subst A r (ordsucc (⋃ r)) hrSucc hEquip);
L247812L247813
have hEquipB: \(\mathrm{equip}({{A} \setminus {\left\{N\right\}}},{\bigcup {r}})\) by equip_ordsucc_remove1 from hNA, hEquipASucc;
formal
statement: equip (A ∖ {N}) (⋃ r);
proof term: exact (equip_ordsucc_remove1 A (⋃ r) N hNA hEquipASucc);
L247815L247819
have hEnumerationB: \(\exists e\in {{A} \setminus {\left\{N\right\}}}^{{\bigcup {r}}},\;{{\lambda i,\;\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} : {\bigcup {r}} \xrightarrow{\sim} {{A} \setminus {\left\{N\right\}}}} \land {\forall i,j\in \bigcup {r},\;{i} \in {j} \to {\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} \in {\left(e\right)\left(j\right)}}\) by hInd from hUnionNat, hBPower, hEquipB;

statement: ∃e ∈ (A ∖ {N})(⋃ r), bij (⋃ r) (A ∖ {N}) (λi ⇒ e i) ∧ ∀i j ∈ ⋃ r, i ∈ j → e i ∈ e j;
proof term: exact (hInd (⋃ r) hUnionNat (A ∖ {N}) hBPower hEquipB);
L247820
apply hEnumerationB;
L247821L247822
let e; assume hEData;
L247823L247824

statement: e ∈ (A ∖ {N})(⋃ r);

L247828L247829

statement: bij (⋃ r) (A ∖ {N}) (λi ⇒ e i);

formal
statement: ∀i j ∈ ⋃ r, i ∈ j → e i ∈ e j;

L247847L247848
have hBSubA: \({{A} \setminus {\left\{N\right\}}} \subseteq {A}\) by setminus_Subq;
L247849
have heA: \({e} \in {{A}^{{\bigcup {r}}}}\);
proof from hBSubA, heB (5 steps)
L247850L247851

statement: (λi ∈ ⋃ r ⇒ e i) ∈ A(⋃ r);
proof term: exact (lam_Pi (⋃ r) (λi ⇒ A) (λi ⇒ e i) (λi hi ⇒ hBSubA (e i) (ap_Pi (⋃ r) (λq ⇒ A ∖ {N}) e i heB hi)));
L247854L247855
have hCopyEq: \({\lambda i\in \bigcup {r},\;\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} = {e}\) by Pi_eta from heB;

statement: (λi ∈ ⋃ r ⇒ e i) = e;
proof term: exact (Pi_eta (⋃ r) (λi ⇒ A ∖ {N}) e heB);

thus thesis by substitution from hCopyEq, hCopyIn;

assume hNInB;

statement: bij (ordsucc (⋃ r)) ((A ∖ {N}) ∪ {N}) (group_word_append (⋃ r) (λq ⇒ e q) N);

statement: bij (ordsucc (⋃ r)) A (group_word_append (⋃ r) (λq ⇒ e q) N);

L247881

thus thesis by extend_indexed_function_last from hi, hAppendExtEarlier, hAppendExtLast;

statement: bij (ordsucc (⋃ r)) A (λi ⇒ god1_extend_indexed_function_last (⋃ r) e N i);

statement: bij r A (λi ⇒ god1_extend_indexed_function_last (⋃ r) e N i);

take \(\mathsf{god1\_extend\_indexed\_function\_last}\left(\bigcup {r},e,N\right)\);

exact (andI (god1_extend_indexed_function_last (⋃ r) e N ∈ Ar) (bij r A (λi ⇒ god1_extend_indexed_function_last (⋃ r) e N i) ∧ ∀i j ∈ r, i ∈ j → god1_extend_indexed_function_last (⋃ r) e N i ∈ god1_extend_indexed_function_last (⋃ r) e N j) hExtInR (andI (bij r A (λi ⇒ god1_extend_indexed_function_last (⋃ r) e N i)) (∀i j ∈ r, i ∈ j → god1_extend_indexed_function_last (⋃ r) e N i ∈ god1_extend_indexed_function_last (⋃ r) e N j) hExtBijR (λi hi j hj hij ⇒ hExtIncreasingSucc i (mem_eq_set_subst r (ordsucc (⋃ r)) i hrSucc hi) j (mem_eq_set_subst r (ordsucc (⋃ r)) j hrSucc hj) hij)));
end;
L248043
have hEnumerationAvoids: \({N} \notin {A} \to \exists e\in {A}^{{r}},\;{{\lambda i,\;\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} : {r} \xrightarrow{\sim} {A}} \land {\forall i,j\in r,\;{i} \in {j} \to {\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} \in {\left(e\right)\left(j\right)}}\);
proof from hA, hInd, hr, hEquip (6 steps)
statement: N ∉ A → ∃e ∈ Ar, bij r A (λi ⇒ e i) ∧ ∀i j ∈ r, i ∈ j → e i ∈ e j;
L248047
assume hNNotA;
L248048L248049
have hASubN: \({A} \subseteq {N}\) by subset_successor_without_new_point from hA, hNNotA;
formal
statement: A ⊆ N;
proof term: exact (god1_subset_successor_without_new_point N A (PowerE (ordsucc N) A hA) hNNotA);
L248051L248052
have hAPowerN: \({A} \in {\wp {N}}\) by PowerI from hASubN;
L248053
thus thesis by hInd from hr, hAPowerN, hEquip;
end;
L248054
thus thesis by orE from hEnumerationContains, hEnumerationAvoids;
formal
exact (orE (N ∈ A) (N ∉ A) (xm (N ∈ A)) (∃e ∈ Ar, bij r A (λi ⇒ e i) ∧ ∀i j ∈ r, i ∈ j → e i ∈ e j) hEnumerationContains hEnumerationAvoids);
end;
L248059L248060
let N; assume hN;
L248061
thus thesis by nat_ind from hEnumerationBase, hEnumerationStep, hN;
formal
exact (nat_ind (λN ⇒ ∀r ∈ ω, ∀A ∈ 𝒫 N, equip A r → ∃e ∈ Ar, bij r A (λi ⇒ e i) ∧ ∀i j ∈ r, i ∈ j → e i ∈ e j) hEnumerationBase hEnumerationStep N hN);
end;
L248068
thus thesis by hEnumerationInduction from hEnumerationInduction;
end;
L248069
have h_s23_t9_strict_tuple_injective: \(\forall idx\in {n}^{{p}},\;{p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p \to \forall i,j\in p,\;{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)} \to {i} = {j}\);
proof from hp (19 steps)
statement: ∀idx ∈ np, strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx → ∀i j ∈ p, idx i = idx j → i = j;
L248073L248074
let idx; assume hidx, hIncreasingTuple;
L248075L248077
have hIncreasing: \(\forall i,j\in p,\;{i} \in {j} \to {idx\left(i\right)} \in {idx\left(j\right)}\) by hIncreasingTuple;
formal
statement: ∀i j ∈ p, i ∈ j → idx i ∈ idx j;
proof term: exact (andER (idx ∈ np) (∀i j ∈ p, i ∈ j → idx i ∈ idx j) hIncreasingTuple);
L248081L248082L248083L248084
let i; assume hi; let j; assume hj, hValues;
L248085L248086
have hOrdI: \(\mathrm{ordinal}({i})\) by nat_p_ordinal from hp, hi;
formal
statement: ordinal i;
proof term: exact (nat_p_ordinal i (omega_nat_p i (omega_TransSet p hp i hi)));
L248088L248089
have hOrdJ: \(\mathrm{ordinal}({j})\) by nat_p_ordinal from hp, hj;
formal
statement: ordinal j;
proof term: exact (nat_p_ordinal j (omega_nat_p j (omega_TransSet p hp j hj)));
L248091
have hImpossibleForward: \({i} \in {j} \to {i} = {j}\);
proof from hValues, hIncreasing, hi, hj (2 steps)
L248092
assume hij;
L248093
thus thesis by FalseE from hValues, hIncreasing, hi, hj, hij;
formal
exact (FalseE ((In_irref (idx i)) (mem_eq_set_subst (idx j) (idx i) (idx i) (eq_sym (idx i) (idx j) hValues) (hIncreasing i hi j hj hij))) (i = j));
end;
L248099
have hImpossibleBackward: \({j} \in {i} \to {i} = {j}\);
proof from hValues, hIncreasing, hj, hi (2 steps)
L248100
assume hji;
L248101
thus thesis by FalseE from hValues, hIncreasing, hj, hi, hji;
formal
exact (FalseE ((In_irref (idx j)) (mem_eq_set_subst (idx i) (idx j) (idx j) hValues (hIncreasing j hj i hi hji))) (i = j));
end;
L248106
thus thesis by ordinal_trichotomy_or_impred from hOrdI, hOrdJ, hImpossibleForward, hImpossibleBackward;
formal
exact (ordinal_trichotomy_or_impred i j hOrdI hOrdJ (i = j) hImpossibleForward (λhij ⇒ hij) hImpossibleBackward);
end;
L248108
have h_s23_t9_increasing_finite_ordinal_bijection_identity: \(\forall r,\;\mathrm{nat\_p}({r}) \to \forall tau:set \to set,\;{tau} : {r} \xrightarrow{\sim} {r} \to \forall i,j\in r,\;{i} \in {j} \to {tau\left(i\right)} \in {tau\left(j\right)} \to \forall i\in r,\;{tau\left(i\right)} = {i}\);
proof (71 steps)
statement: ∀r, nat_p r → ∀tau : set → set, bij r r tau → (∀i j ∈ r, i ∈ j → tau i ∈ tau j) → ∀i ∈ r, tau i = i;
L248113
have hIncreasingBijectionBase: \(\forall tau:set \to set,\;{tau} : {0} \xrightarrow{\sim} {0} \to \forall i,j\in 0,\;{i} \in {j} \to {tau\left(i\right)} \in {tau\left(j\right)} \to \forall i\in 0,\;{tau\left(i\right)} = {i}\);
proof (5 steps)
statement: ∀tau : set → set, bij 0 0 tau → (∀i j ∈ 0, i ∈ j → tau i ∈ tau j) → ∀i ∈ 0, tau i = i;
L248117L248118L248119L248120
let tau; assume hTauBij, hTauIncreasing; let i; assume hi;
L248121
thus thesis by FalseE from hi;
formal
exact (FalseE (EmptyE i hi) (tau i = i));
end;
L248122
have hIncreasingBijectionStep: \(\forall r,\;\mathrm{nat\_p}({r}) \to \forall tau:set \to set,\;{tau} : {r} \xrightarrow{\sim} {r} \to \forall i,j\in r,\;{i} \in {j} \to {tau\left(i\right)} \in {tau\left(j\right)} \to \forall i\in r,\;{tau\left(i\right)} = {i} \to \forall tau:set \to set,\;{tau} : {{r} \cup \{{r}\}} \xrightarrow{\sim} {{r} \cup \{{r}\}} \to \forall i,j\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;{i} \in {j} \to {tau\left(i\right)} \in {tau\left(j\right)} \to \forall i\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;{tau\left(i\right)} = {i}\);
proof (63 steps)
statement: ∀r, nat_p r → (∀tau : set → set, bij r r tau → (∀i j ∈ r, i ∈ j → tau i ∈ tau j) → ∀i ∈ r, tau i = i) → ∀tau : set → set, bij (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) tau → (∀i j ∈ ordsucc r, i ∈ j → tau i ∈ tau j) → ∀i ∈ ordsucc r, tau i = i;
L248131L248132L248133L248134
let r; assume hr, hInd; let tau; assume hTauBij, hTauIncreasing;
L248135L248136
have hTauLastIn: \({tau\left(r\right)} \in {{r} \cup \{{r}\}}\) by bijection_maps_into from hTauBij;
formal
statement: tau r ∈ ordsucc r;
proof term: exact (god1_bijection_maps_into (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) tau hTauBij r (ordsuccI2 r));
L248138
have hTauLastOldImpossible: \({tau\left(r\right)} \in {r} \to {tau\left(r\right)} = {r}\);
proof from hTauBij, hTauIncreasing, hr (18 steps)
L248139
assume hTauLastOld;
L248140L248141
have hPreimageLast: \(\exists k\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;{tau\left(k\right)} = {r}\) by bijection_surjective from hTauBij;
formal
statement: ∃k ∈ ordsucc r, tau k = r;
proof term: exact (god1_bijection_surjective (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) tau hTauBij r (ordsuccI2 r));
L248143
have hEveryPreimageImpossible: \(\forall k\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;{tau\left(k\right)} = {r} \to {tau\left(r\right)} = {r}\);
proof from hTauIncreasing, hr, hTauLastOld (13 steps)
L248145L248146
let k; assume hk, hTauK;
L248147
have hPreimageOldImpossible: \({k} \in {r} \to {tau\left(r\right)} = {r}\);
proof from hTauK, hTauIncreasing, hr, hTauLastOld (6 steps)
L248148
assume hkOld;
L248149L248150
have hRInTauLast: \({r} \in {tau\left(r\right)}\) by substitution from hTauK, hTauIncreasing, hkOld;
formal
statement: r ∈ tau r;
proof term: exact (mem_eq_substR (tau r) (tau k) r hTauK (hTauIncreasing k (ordsuccI1 r k hkOld) r (ordsuccI2 r) hkOld));
L248153L248154
have hOrdR: \(\mathrm{ordinal}({r})\) by nat_p_ordinal from hr;
L248155
thus thesis by FalseE from hOrdR, hTauLastOld, hRInTauLast;
formal
exact (FalseE ((In_irref r) ((ordinal_TransSet r hOrdR) (tau r) hTauLastOld r hRInTauLast)) (tau r = r));
end;
L248159
have hPreimageLastImpossible: \({k} = {r} \to {tau\left(r\right)} = {r}\);
proof from hTauK (2 steps)
L248160
assume hkLast;
L248161
thus thesis by transitivity from hkLast, hTauK;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (tau r) (tau k) r (f_eq_i tau r k (eq_sym k r hkLast)) hTauK);
end;
L248163
thus thesis by orE from hk, hPreimageOldImpossible, hPreimageLastImpossible;
formal
exact (orE (k ∈ r) (k = r) (ordsuccE r k hk) (tau r = r) hPreimageOldImpossible hPreimageLastImpossible);
end;
L248165
thus thesis by choose from hPreimageLast, hEveryPreimageImpossible;
formal
exact (exandE_i (λk ⇒ k ∈ ordsucc r) (λk ⇒ tau k = r) hPreimageLast (tau r = r) hEveryPreimageImpossible);
end;
L248168L248169
have hTauLastEq: \({tau\left(r\right)} = {r}\) by orE from hTauLastIn, hTauLastOldImpossible;
formal
statement: tau r = r;
proof term: exact (orE (tau r ∈ r) (tau r = r) (ordsuccE r (tau r) hTauLastIn) (tau r = r) hTauLastOldImpossible (λh ⇒ h));
L248172
have hRestrictMaps: \(\forall i\in r,\;{tau\left(i\right)} \in {r}\);
proof from hTauLastEq, hTauIncreasing (3 steps)
L248173L248174
let i; assume hi;
L248175
thus thesis by mem_eq_set_subst from hTauLastEq, hTauIncreasing, hi;
formal
exact (mem_eq_set_subst (tau r) r (tau i) hTauLastEq (hTauIncreasing i (ordsuccI1 r i hi) r (ordsuccI2 r) hi));
end;
L248178L248180
have hRestrictInjective: \(\forall i,j\in r,\;{tau\left(i\right)} = {tau\left(j\right)} \to {i} = {j}\) by bijection_injective from hTauBij;
formal
statement: ∀i j ∈ r, tau i = tau j → i = j;
proof term: exact (λi hi j hj ⇒ god1_bijection_injective (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) tau hTauBij i (ordsuccI1 r i hi) j (ordsuccI1 r j hj));
L248183
have hRestrictSurjective: \(\forall y\in r,\;\exists i\in r,\;{tau\left(i\right)} = {y}\);
proof from hTauBij, hTauLastEq (17 steps)
L248185L248186
let y; assume hy;
L248187L248188
have hPreimage: \(\exists k\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;{tau\left(k\right)} = {y}\) by bijection_surjective from hTauBij, hy;
formal
statement: ∃k ∈ ordsucc r, tau k = y;
proof term: exact (god1_bijection_surjective (ordsucc r) (ordsucc r) tau hTauBij y (ordsuccI1 r y hy));
L248191
have hPreimageRestricts: \(\forall k\in {r} \cup \{{r}\},\;{tau\left(k\right)} = {y} \to \exists i\in r,\;{tau\left(i\right)} = {y}\);
proof from hTauLastEq, hy (11 steps)
L248193L248194
let k; assume hk, hTauK;
L248195
have hPreimageOld: \({k} \in {r} \to \exists i\in r,\;{tau\left(i\right)} = {y}\);
proof from hTauK (2 steps)
L248196
assume hkOld;
L248197
thus thesis by witness \(k\) from hkOld, hTauK;
formal
exact (ex_intro (λi ⇒ i ∈ r ∧ tau i = y) k (andI (k ∈ r) (tau k = y) hkOld hTauK));
end;
L248199
have hPreimageCannotBeLast: \({k} = {r} \to \exists i\in r,\;{tau\left(i\right)} = {y}\);
proof from hTauLastEq, hTauK, hy (4 steps)
L248201
assume hkLast;
L248202L248203
have hRIsY: \({r} = {y}\) by transitivity from hTauLastEq, hkLast, hTauK;
formal
statement: r = y;
proof term: exact (eq_i_tra r (tau r) y (eq_sym (tau r) r hTauLastEq) (eq_i_tra (tau r) (tau k) y (f_eq_i tau r k (eq_sym k r hkLast)) hTauK));
L248207
thus thesis by FalseE from hRIsY, hy;
formal
exact (FalseE ((In_irref r) (mem_eq_substL r y r hRIsY hy)) (∃i ∈ r, tau i = y));
end;
L248211
thus thesis by orE from hk, hPreimageOld, hPreimageCannotBeLast;
formal
exact (orE (k ∈ r) (k = r) (ordsuccE r k hk) (∃i ∈ r, tau i = y) hPreimageOld hPreimageCannotBeLast);
end;
L248214
thus thesis by choose from hPreimage, hPreimageRestricts;
formal
exact (exandE_i (λk ⇒ k ∈ ordsucc r) (λk ⇒ tau k = y) hPreimage (∃i ∈ r, tau i = y) hPreimageRestricts);
end;
L248217L248218
have hRestrictBij: \({tau} : {r} \xrightarrow{\sim} {r}\) by bijectivity from hRestrictMaps, hRestrictInjective, hRestrictSurjective;
formal
statement: bij r r tau;
proof term: exact (bijI r r tau hRestrictMaps hRestrictInjective hRestrictSurjective);
L248219L248221
have hRestrictIncreasing: \(\forall i,j\in r,\;{i} \in {j} \to {tau\left(i\right)} \in {tau\left(j\right)}\) by hTauIncreasing from hTauIncreasing;
formal
statement: ∀i j ∈ r, i ∈ j → tau i ∈ tau j;
proof term: exact (λi hi j hj hij ⇒ hTauIncreasing i (ordsuccI1 r i hi) j (ordsuccI1 r j hj) hij);
L248223L248224
let i; assume hi;
L248225L248226
have hIndexOld: \({i} \in {r} \to {tau\left(i\right)} = {i}\) by hInd from hInd, hRestrictBij, hRestrictIncreasing;
formal
statement: i ∈ r → tau i = i;
proof term: exact (λhiOld ⇒ hInd tau hRestrictBij hRestrictIncreasing i hiOld);
L248227
have hIndexLast: \({i} = {r} \to {tau\left(i\right)} = {i}\);
proof from hTauLastEq (2 steps)
L248228
assume hiLast;
L248229
thus thesis by transitivity from hiLast, hTauLastEq;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (tau i) (tau r) i (f_eq_i tau i r hiLast) (eq_i_tra (tau r) r i hTauLastEq (eq_sym i r hiLast)));
end;
L248232
thus thesis by orE from hi, hIndexOld, hIndexLast;
formal
exact (orE (i ∈ r) (i = r) (ordsuccE r i hi) (tau i = i) hIndexOld hIndexLast);
end;
L248234
thus thesis by nat_ind from hIncreasingBijectionBase, hIncreasingBijectionStep;
formal
exact (λr hr ⇒ nat_ind (λq ⇒ ∀tau : set → set, bij q q tau → (∀i j ∈ q, i ∈ j → tau i ∈ tau j) → ∀i ∈ q, tau i = i) hIncreasingBijectionBase hIncreasingBijectionStep r hr);
end;
L248240
have h_s23_t9_increasing_enumeration_unique: \(\forall A\in \wp {n},\;\forall e,d\in {A}^{{p}},\;{\lambda i,\;\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} : {p} \xrightarrow{\sim} {A} \to {\lambda i,\;d\left(i\right)} : {p} \xrightarrow{\sim} {A} \to \forall i,j\in p,\;{i} \in {j} \to {\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} \in {\left(e\right)\left(j\right)} \to \forall i,j\in p,\;{i} \in {j} \to {d\left(i\right)} \in {d\left(j\right)} \to {e} = {d}\);
proof from hp, hn, h_s23_t9_increasing_finite_ordinal_bijection_identity (63 steps)
statement: ∀A ∈ 𝒫 n, ∀e d ∈ Ap, bij p A (λi ⇒ e i) → bij p A (λi ⇒ d i) → (∀i j ∈ p, i ∈ j → e i ∈ e j) → (∀i j ∈ p, i ∈ j → d i ∈ d j) → e = d;
L248247L248248L248249L248250L248251L248252
let A; assume hA; let e; assume he; let d; assume hd, hEBij, hDBij, hEIncreasing, hDIncreasing;
L248253L248254
have hEInverseBij: \({{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}} : {A} \xrightarrow{\sim} {p}\) by bij_inv from hEBij;
formal
statement: bij A p (inv p (λq ⇒ e q));
proof term: exact (bij_inv p A (λq ⇒ e q) hEBij);
L248255L248257
have hTauBij: \({\lambda i,\;{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(i\right)})} : {p} \xrightarrow{\sim} {p}\) by bij_comp from hDBij, hEInverseBij;
formal
statement: bij p p (λi ⇒ inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i));
proof term: exact (bij_comp p A p (λi ⇒ d i) (inv p (λq ⇒ e q)) hDBij hEInverseBij);
L248259
have hTauIncreasing: \(\forall i,j\in p,\;{i} \in {j} \to {{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(i\right)})} \in {{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(j\right)})}\);
proof from hDBij, hEBij, hp, hDIncreasing, hEIncreasing, hA, hn (41 steps)
statement: ∀i j ∈ p, i ∈ j → inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i) ∈ inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j);
L248262L248263L248264L248265
let i; assume hi; let j; assume hj, hij;
L248266L248267
have hDiA: \({d\left(i\right)} \in {A}\) by bijection_maps_into from hDBij, hi;
formal
statement: d i ∈ A;
proof term: exact (god1_bijection_maps_into p A (λq ⇒ d q) hDBij i hi);
L248268L248269
have hDjA: \({d\left(j\right)} \in {A}\) by bijection_maps_into from hDBij, hj;
formal
statement: d j ∈ A;
proof term: exact (god1_bijection_maps_into p A (λq ⇒ d q) hDBij j hj);
L248270L248273
have hTauIData: \({{{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(i\right)})} \in {p}} \land {{\left(e\right)\left({\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(i\right)})\right)} = {d\left(i\right)}}\) by bijection_surjective from hEBij, hDiA;
formal
statement: inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i) ∈ p ∧ e (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i)) = d i;
proof term: exact (surj_rinv p A (λq ⇒ e q) (god1_bijection_surjective p A (λq ⇒ e q) hEBij) (d i) hDiA);
L248276L248279
have hTauJData: \({{{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(j\right)})} \in {p}} \land {{\left(e\right)\left({\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(j\right)})\right)} = {d\left(j\right)}}\) by bijection_surjective from hEBij, hDjA;
formal
statement: inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j) ∈ p ∧ e (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j)) = d j;
proof term: exact (surj_rinv p A (λq ⇒ e q) (god1_bijection_surjective p A (λq ⇒ e q) hEBij) (d j) hDjA);
L248282L248283
have hTauIIn: \({{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(i\right)})} \in {p}\) by hTauIData;
formal
statement: inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i) ∈ p;
proof term: exact (andEL (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i) ∈ p) (e (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i)) = d i) hTauIData);
L248286L248287
have hTauJIn: \({{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(j\right)})} \in {p}\) by hTauJData;
formal
statement: inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j) ∈ p;
proof term: exact (andEL (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j) ∈ p) (e (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j)) = d j) hTauJData);
L248290L248291
have hEvalI: \({\left(e\right)\left({\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(i\right)})\right)} = {d\left(i\right)}\) by hTauIData;
formal
statement: e (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i)) = d i;
proof term: exact (andER (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i) ∈ p) (e (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i)) = d i) hTauIData);
L248294L248295
have hEvalJ: \({\left(e\right)\left({\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(j\right)})\right)} = {d\left(j\right)}\) by hTauJData;
formal
statement: e (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j)) = d j;
proof term: exact (andER (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j) ∈ p) (e (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j)) = d j) hTauJData);
L248298L248299
have hOrdTauI: \(\mathrm{ordinal}({{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(i\right)})})\) by nat_p_ordinal from hp, hTauIIn;
formal
statement: ordinal (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i));
proof term: exact (nat_p_ordinal (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i)) (omega_nat_p (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i)) (omega_TransSet p hp (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i)) hTauIIn)));
L248303L248304
have hOrdTauJ: \(\mathrm{ordinal}({{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(j\right)})})\) by nat_p_ordinal from hp, hTauJIn;
formal
statement: ordinal (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j));
proof term: exact (nat_p_ordinal (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j)) (omega_nat_p (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j)) (omega_TransSet p hp (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j)) hTauJIn)));
L248308L248313
have hTauForward: \({{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(i\right)})} \in {{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(j\right)})} \to {{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(i\right)})} \in {{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(j\right)})}\) by h;
formal
statement: inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i) ∈ inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j) → inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i) ∈ inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j);
proof term: exact (λh ⇒ h);
L248314
have hTauEqualImpossible: \({{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(i\right)})} = {{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(j\right)})} \to {{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(i\right)})} \in {{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(j\right)})}\);
proof from hEvalI, hEvalJ, hDIncreasing, hi, hj, hij (4 steps)
statement: inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i) = inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j) → inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i) ∈ inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j);
L248319
assume hTauEqual;
L248320L248321
have hDiDj: \({d\left(i\right)} = {d\left(j\right)}\) by transitivity from hEvalI, hTauEqual, hEvalJ;
formal
statement: d i = d j;
proof term: exact (eq_i_tra (d i) (e (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i))) (d j) (eq_sym (e (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i))) (d i) hEvalI) (eq_i_tra (e (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i))) (e (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j))) (d j) (f_eq_i (λq ⇒ e q) (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i)) (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j)) hTauEqual) hEvalJ));
L248333
thus thesis by FalseE from hDiDj, hDIncreasing, hi, hj, hij;
formal
exact (FalseE ((In_irref (d i)) (mem_eq_set_subst (d j) (d i) (d i) (eq_sym (d i) (d j) hDiDj) (hDIncreasing i hi j hj hij))) (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i) ∈ inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j)));
end;
L248340
have hTauBackwardImpossible: \({{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(j\right)})} \in {{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(i\right)})} \to {{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(i\right)})} \in {{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(j\right)})}\);
proof from hEvalI, hEvalJ, hEIncreasing, hTauJIn, hTauIIn, hA, hDjA, hn, hDIncreasing, hi, hj, hij (8 steps)
statement: inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j) ∈ inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i) → inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i) ∈ inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j);
L248345
assume hTauBackward;
L248346L248347
have hDjInDi: \({d\left(j\right)} \in {d\left(i\right)}\) by mem_eq_set_subst from hEvalI, hEvalJ, hEIncreasing, hTauJIn, hTauIIn, hTauBackward;
formal
statement: d j ∈ d i;
proof term: exact (mem_eq_set_subst (e (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i))) (d i) (d j) hEvalI (mem_eq_substL (e (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i))) (e (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j))) (d j) (eq_sym (e (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j))) (d j) hEvalJ) (hEIncreasing (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j)) hTauJIn (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i)) hTauIIn hTauBackward)));
L248356L248357
have hDjInN: \({d\left(j\right)} \in {n}\) by PowerE from hA, hDjA;
formal
statement: d j ∈ n;
proof term: exact ((PowerE n A hA) (d j) hDjA);
L248358L248359
have hOrdDj: \(\mathrm{ordinal}({d\left(j\right)})\) by nat_p_ordinal from hn, hDjInN;
formal
statement: ordinal (d j);
proof term: exact (nat_p_ordinal (d j) (omega_nat_p (d j) (omega_TransSet n hn (d j) hDjInN)));
L248361
thus thesis by FalseE from hOrdDj, hDIncreasing, hi, hj, hij, hDjInDi;
formal
exact (FalseE ((In_irref (d j)) ((ordinal_TransSet (d j) hOrdDj) (d i) (hDIncreasing i hi j hj hij) (d j) hDjInDi)) (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i) ∈ inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j)));
end;
L248367
thus thesis by ordinal_trichotomy_or_impred from hOrdTauI, hOrdTauJ, hTauForward, hTauEqualImpossible, hTauBackwardImpossible;
formal
exact (ordinal_trichotomy_or_impred (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i)) (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j)) hOrdTauI hOrdTauJ (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i) ∈ inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d j)) hTauForward hTauEqualImpossible hTauBackwardImpossible);
end;
L248374L248376
have hTauIdentity: \(\forall i\in p,\;{{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({d\left(i\right)})} = {i}\) by h_s23_t9_increasing_finite_ordinal_bijection_identity from hp, hTauBij, hTauIncreasing;

statement: ∀i ∈ p, inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i) = i;

L248380
have hPointwise: \(\forall i\in p,\;{\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} = {d\left(i\right)}\);
proof from hDBij, hEBij, hTauIdentity (7 steps)

let i; assume hi;
L248383L248384

statement: d i ∈ A;
proof term: exact (god1_bijection_maps_into p A (λq ⇒ d q) hDBij i hi);

formal
statement: e (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i)) = d i;

L248393
thus thesis by transitivity from hTauIdentity, hi, hEvalI;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (e i) (e (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i))) (d i) (f_eq_i (λq ⇒ e q) i (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i)) (eq_sym (inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (d i)) i (hTauIdentity i hi))) hEvalI);
end;
L248399
thus thesis by extensionality from he, hd, hPointwise;
formal
exact (Pi_ext p (λi ⇒ A) e he d hd hPointwise);
end;
L248400

statement: bij ({idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} ⨯ permutation_group p) {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} (λu ⇒ λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h));
L248406

statement: ∀u ∈ ({idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} ⨯ permutation_group p), (λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) ∈ {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)};
L248413L248414
let u; assume hu;
L248415L248418

formal
statement: u 0 ∈ {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} ∧ u 1 ∈ permutation_group p;

statement: u 0 ∈ {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx};

statement: u 1 ∈ permutation_group p;
proof term: exact (andER (u 0 ∈ {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx}) (u 1 ∈ permutation_group p) hUData);

statement: u 0 ∈ np;

statement: strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p (u 0);

statement: (λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) ∈ np;

L248446L248448

statement: ∀i j ∈ p, u 0 (u 1 i) = u 0 (u 1 j) → i = j;

let i; assume hi; let j; assume hj, hValues;
L248456L248457

statement: u 1 i ∈ p;

statement: u 1 j ∈ p;
proof term: exact (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ p) (u 1) j hUSigmaIn hj);

statement: u 1 i = u 1 j;

thus thesis by bijection_injective from hUSigmaBij, hi, hj, hSigmaEqual;
formal
exact (god1_bijection_injective p p (λh ⇒ u 1 h) hUSigmaBij i hi j hj hSigmaEqual);
end;

have hNoCollision: \(\neg {\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{\left(\lambda h\in p,\;u\left(0,u\left(1,h\right)\right)\right)\left(i\right)} = {\left(\lambda h\in p,\;u\left(0,u\left(1,h\right)\right)\right)\left(j\right)}}}\);

statement: not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ (λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) i = (λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) j);

assume hCollision;
L248469
thus thesis by choose from hCollision, hComposedInjective;
formal
exact (exandE_i (λi ⇒ i ∈ p) (λi ⇒ ∃j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ (λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) i = (λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) j) hCollision False (λi hi hCollisionJ ⇒ exandE_i (λj ⇒ j ∈ p) (λj ⇒ i ≠ j ∧ (λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) i = (λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) j) hCollisionJ False (λj hj hCollisionData ⇒ (andEL (i ≠ j) ((λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) i = (λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) j) hCollisionData) (hComposedInjective i hi j hj (eq_i_tra (u 0 (u 1 i)) ((λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) i) (u 0 (u 1 j)) (eq_sym ((λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) i) (u 0 (u 1 i)) (beta p (λh ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) i hi)) (eq_i_tra ((λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) i) ((λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) j) (u 0 (u 1 j)) (andER (i ≠ j) ((λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) i = (λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) j) hCollisionData) (beta p (λh ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) j hj)))))));
end;
L248504
thus thesis by set introduction from hComposedIn, hNoCollision;
formal
exact (SepI (np) (λidx ⇒ not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)) (λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) hComposedIn hNoCollision);
end;

statement: u 0 ∈ {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} ∧ u 1 ∈ permutation_group p;

have hMapPointwise: \(\forall h\in p,\;{u\left(0,u\left(1,h\right)\right)} = {v\left(0,v\left(1,h\right)\right)}\);

statement: ∀h ∈ p, u 0 (u 1 h) = v 0 (v 1 h);

let h; assume hh;
L248587
thus thesis by transitivity from hh, hMapEq;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (u 0 (u 1 h)) ((λq ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 q)) h) (v 0 (v 1 h)) (eq_sym ((λq ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 q)) h) (u 0 (u 1 h)) (beta p (λq ⇒ u 0 (u 1 q)) h hh)) (eq_i_tra ((λq ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 q)) h) ((λq ∈ p ⇒ v 0 (v 1 q)) h) (v 0 (v 1 h)) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ z h) (λq ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 q)) (λq ∈ p ⇒ v 0 (v 1 q)) hMapEq) (beta p (λq ⇒ v 0 (v 1 q)) h hh)));
end;

have hImageUV: \({\left\{u\left(0,i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}} \subseteq {\left\{v\left(0,i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}}\);

L248614L248615
let y; assume hy;
L248616
thus thesis by image elimination using bijection_surjective from hy, hU1Bij, hMapPointwise, hV1In;
formal
exact (ReplE_impred p (λi ⇒ u 0 i) y hy (y ∈ {v 0 i|i ∈ p}) (λi hi hyi ⇒ exandE_i (λh ⇒ h ∈ p) (λh ⇒ u 1 h = i) (god1_bijection_surjective p p (λh ⇒ u 1 h) hU1Bij i hi) (y ∈ {v 0 i|i ∈ p}) (λh hh hSigma ⇒ mem_eq_substL {v 0 q|q ∈ p} (v 0 (v 1 h)) y (eq_i_tra y (u 0 i) (v 0 (v 1 h)) hyi (eq_i_tra (u 0 i) (u 0 (u 1 h)) (v 0 (v 1 h)) (f_eq_i (λq ⇒ u 0 q) i (u 1 h) (eq_sym (u 1 h) i hSigma)) (hMapPointwise h hh))) (ReplI p (λq ⇒ v 0 q) (v 1 h) (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ p) (v 1) h hV1In hh)))));
end;
L248632
have hImageVU: \({\left\{v\left(0,i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}} \subseteq {\left\{u\left(0,i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}}\);
proof from hV1Bij, hMapPointwise, hU1In (3 steps)
L248633L248634
let y; assume hy;
L248635
thus thesis by image elimination using bijection_surjective from hy, hV1Bij, hMapPointwise, hU1In;
formal
exact (ReplE_impred p (λi ⇒ v 0 i) y hy (y ∈ {u 0 i|i ∈ p}) (λi hi hyi ⇒ exandE_i (λh ⇒ h ∈ p) (λh ⇒ v 1 h = i) (god1_bijection_surjective p p (λh ⇒ v 1 h) hV1Bij i hi) (y ∈ {u 0 i|i ∈ p}) (λh hh hSigma ⇒ mem_eq_substL {u 0 q|q ∈ p} (u 0 (u 1 h)) y (eq_i_tra y (v 0 i) (u 0 (u 1 h)) hyi (eq_i_tra (v 0 i) (v 0 (v 1 h)) (u 0 (u 1 h)) (f_eq_i (λq ⇒ v 0 q) i (v 1 h) (eq_sym (v 1 h) i hSigma)) (eq_sym (u 0 (u 1 h)) (v 0 (v 1 h)) (hMapPointwise h hh)))) (ReplI p (λq ⇒ u 0 q) (u 1 h) (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ p) (u 1) h hU1In hh)))));
end;
L248652L248653
have hImagesEq: \({\left\{u\left(0,i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}} = {\left\{v\left(0,i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}}\) by extensionality from hImageUV, hImageVU;
formal
statement: {u 0 i|i ∈ p} = {v 0 i|i ∈ p};
proof term: exact (set_ext {u 0 i|i ∈ p} {v 0 i|i ∈ p} hImageUV hImageVU);
L248655L248656
have hU0Inj: \({\lambda i,\;u\left(0,i\right)} : {p} \hookrightarrow {n}\) by injI from hU0Maps, hU0Injective;
formal
statement: inj p n (λi ⇒ u 0 i);
proof term: exact (injI p n (λi ⇒ u 0 i) hU0Maps hU0Injective);
L248657L248658
have hV0Inj: \({\lambda i,\;v\left(0,i\right)} : {p} \hookrightarrow {n}\) by injI from hV0Maps, hV0Injective;
formal
statement: inj p n (λi ⇒ v 0 i);
proof term: exact (injI p n (λi ⇒ v 0 i) hV0Maps hV0Injective);
L248659L248660
have hU0BijImage: \({\lambda i,\;u\left(0,i\right)} : {p} \xrightarrow{\sim} {\left\{u\left(0,i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}}\) by injective_family_bijective_onto_image from hU0Inj;
formal
statement: bij p {u 0 i|i ∈ p} (λi ⇒ u 0 i);
proof term: exact (god1_injective_family_bijective_onto_image p n (λi ⇒ u 0 i) hU0Inj);
L248662L248663
